Short CV

He was born in in Istanbul in 1988. He graduated from Yildiz Technical University, Environmental Engineering in 2011. He worked voluntarily on a TUBİTAK project named “Research of wastewater treatment alternative for small settlements: A case study on Yamula Dam Basin” and a research named “Investigation of the effect of fish farms on flora and fauna in aquatic environments”. He studied on “Treatment of bilge waste waters with Upflow Anaerobic Sludge Blanket Reactor (UASB)” in his bachelor thesis.

He continued his education as a graduate student while worked as a project engineer after his bachelor degree. In 2013 he started to work on an EU 7

th

Framework Project named “Climate Induced Changes on the Hydrology of Mediterranean Basins (CLIMB)”. He finished his postgraduate thesis named “Climate change impacts on water resources” in 2014.

He started his doctorate in Yildiz Technical University in 2014. He is still working on TUBİTAK Project named “Development of Watershed Information System” and his PhD Thesis named “Integration of Modelling Tools to Decision Support System in Integrated Watershed Management”.
